---
title: "Viewership Report: Suits"
author: "Twoje Imię i Nazwisko"
date: today
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Brief Description of the Show

*Suits* is an American legal drama television series. The show is set at a fictional New York City law firm and follows the story of *Harvey Specter*, a highly successful corporate lawyer, and his associate *Mike Ross*, who has a photographic memory but never attended law school. The series premiered in 2011 and quickly gained a massive fan base.

![Suits Logo](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/1/1c/Suits_Logo.png/800px-Suits_Logo.png)
---

##
